positive: Minimalist geometric portrait of a majestic forest fox sitting on smooth stacked river stones. The fox is rendered in a strong, silhouette-like profile, facing the viewer. Use clean, contrasting lines and negative space for the background, incorporating stylized woodland motifs like abstract leaves and overlapping mountain shapes. Style is a modern vector graphic mixed with fine linework illustration, evoking Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print aesthetics. Dominant color palette is muted earth tones (deep moss green, slate gray, burnt sienna) contrasted sharply with pure white background. High contrast, central composition, ideal for screen printing on apparel. --ar 1:1
